header.description: Stores in n8n memory, so no credentials required

notice.displayName: This node must be connected to an AI agent. Insert one

scalingNotice.displayName: This node stores memory locally in the n8n instance. It is not compatible with Queue Mode or Multi-Main setups, as memory will not be shared across workers. For production use with scaling, consider using an external memory store such as Redis, Postgres, or another persistent memory node.

sessionKey.description: The key to use to store session ID in the memory

fromInput.description: Looks for an input field called 'sessionId' that is coming from a directly connected Chat Trigger

customKey.description: Use an expression to reference data in previous nodes or enter static text
